mapper.select: select rollout_id from public_agent_config_rollouts where status = 'DRAINING' order by created_at desc limit 1

select r.rollout_id from public_agent_config_rollouts r where r.status = 'DRAINING' and ( exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_servers s where s.rollout_id = r.rollout_id and s.status <> 'SYNCED' ) or exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_targets t join opencode_server_processes p on p.linux_server_id = t.linux_server_id and p.container_id = t.container_id and p.port = t.port where t.rollout_id = r.rollout_id and t.status <> 'DISPOSED' and p.user_id = #{userId} ) ) order by r.created_at desc limit 1

select r.rollout_id, r.branch, r.commit_hash, r.trace_id from public_agent_config_rollouts r join public_agent_config_rollout_servers s on s.rollout_id = r.rollout_id where r.status = 'DRAINING' and s.status = 'PENDING' and s.linux_server_id = #{linuxServerId} order by r.created_at limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into public_agent_config_rollout_servers( rollout_id, linux_server_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) values (#{rolloutId}, #{linuxServerId}, 'PENDING', #{now}, #{now}) on conflict (rollout_id, linux_server_id) do nothing
mapper.select: select target_id, rollout_id, linux_server_id, container_id, port, base_url, retry_count, lease_until from public_agent_config_rollout_targets t where exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollouts r where r.rollout_id = t.rollout_id and r.status = 'DRAINING' ) and not exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_servers s where s.rollout_id = t.rollout_id and s.status <> 'SYNCED' ) and t.linux_server_id = #{linuxServerId} and ((status = 'RETRY_WAIT' and next_retry_at <= #{now}) or (status = 'PROCESSING' and lease_until <= #{now})) order by next_retry_at, created_at for update skip locked limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update public_agent_config_rollouts r set status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = #{now}, updated_at = #{now} where r.status = 'DRAINING' and not exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_servers s where s.rollout_id = r.rollout_id and s.status <> 'SYNCED' ) and not exists ( select 1 from public_agent_config_rollout_targets t where t.rollout_id = r.rollout_id and t.status <> 'DISPOSED' )
